sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Rayo Vallecano are in strong form, unbeaten in their last 4 matches with 3 wins and 1 draw, showing offensive capability with early goals. Mallorca, however, have struggled, losing 4 of their last 5 matches, conceding early and often failing to keep clean sheets.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Mallorca have dominated recent head-to-head encounters, winning 4 of the last 5 matches against Rayo Vallecano, including a 1-0 victory in their most recent meeting. Rayo have consistently failed to keep clean sheets against Mallorca in the last 6 encounters.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Rayo Vallecano (9th, 51 points) have a slightly better league standing than Mallorca (10th, 47 points), with a stronger attack (41 goals vs 35). Both teams have similar defensive records (45 vs 44 goals conceded), but Rayo create more big chances (76 vs Mallorca's stats not detailed).

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Trends
sections.text: Rayo's Jorge de Frutos and Álvaro García are in decent form, contributing goals and assists, while Mallorca's Vedat Muriqi remains a threat with a strong head-to-head record (5 goals in 5 games). Rayo often score first, while Mallorca struggle defensively away from home.
